pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Pagefind is a fully-static search library for static sites. It generates a compressed search index from built HTML at deploy time; the resulting bundle runs entirely in the browser with no server component. Consumed by Calepin (app-text/calepin) when the site config sets search = "pagefind".
This is the -bin repackage of Nixpkgs' aarch64-linux glibc build (extended variant, ~58MB — bundles Chinese/Japanese/Korean/Arabic/etc. stemming assets). Upstream's own musl prebuilts crash on Asahi/RPi5 because their embedded jemalloc is compile-time-pinned to 4K pages (Pagefind #1147). A source ebuild is deferred until that upstream fix lands or a build path that avoids Node/npm exists. patchelf at emerge time switches the interpreter to /usr/lib64/'s aarch64 loader and drops the /nix/store/ RPATH so runtime links resolve against zentoo's system glibc and gcc runtime.
